arts.ttl: Chris Sutton spots the transfer trap behind Aston Villa's struggles
arts.sum: "I also think we're at a stage now where you look at the Premier League, Villa are in 12th and Tottenham are in seventh and there's a point between them. Former Aston Villa striker Chris Sutton believes that the current squad, which in his view overachieved last season, hasn't changed substantially enough for this campaign and that has contributed to the struggles Villa are currently encountering.

arts.ttl: Pundits agree as they make 'desperate' Aston Villa v Brentford prediction
arts.sum: and former Aston Villa players - Chris Sutton and Paul Merson both agree that Villa will return to winning ways at long last on Wednesday night when they entertain Brentford. It goes without saying that Unai Emery is in need of a return to winning ways, in the first leg of what is a Villa Park double header this week; the Bees, winless on the road, make the trip on Wednesday and then rock bottom Southampton, also without an away win, venture north on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Former Aston Villa defender suffers 'significant' injury to throw reunion into doubt
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa defender Axel Tuanzebe has suffered a'significant' injury which is set to keep him sidelined for a sizeable portion of the remainder of this Premier League season, his Ipswich Town manager Kieran McKenna has confirmed. The versatile defender, who indeed encountered various injury problems across his various spells at Villa, helped the Tractor Boys secure promotion to the top flight last year and had continued his run in the side this year, but he is now due to be missing for the foreseeable future having suffered a serious hamstring injury which could require corrective surgery - although McKenna is optimistic that won't be necessary.

arts.ttl: I feared Aston Villa burnout but there was nothing I could do about it
arts.sum: Martin O’Neill believes ‘ Aston Villa will be fine’ but has suggested their squad is being stretched by having to play in the Champions and Premier League. Having done so well previously getting into Champions League, I know it's a different format and actually, I think the format really suits teams like Aston Villa at this minute – your first real bash at and you've got 24 teams still involved after you've played eight games.

arts.ttl: Worrying Emi Martinez injury claim emerges as Aston Villa prepare for busy schedule
arts.sum: Robin Olsen was summoned from the bench to replace him, with Unai Emery post match unable to offer an immediate update on the severity of Martinez's injury: "I don’t know now what exactly. Argentinian reporter Gaston Edul has posted on social media that Martinez suffered 'a small fracture in one of the fingers of his hand.

arts.ttl: Broken wheelchair, dirty toilets and in with home fans - following Aston Villa all over Europe - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Villa fan Jude Aston, who has travelled to all but one of the club's eight European fixtures since the start of last season, admits it's an issue which ultimately takes away from his experience. A total of 232 disabled supporters responded to a Level Playing Field survey earlier this year, which raised concerns over accessibility and inclusion at grounds in Europe as 79% of wheelchair users said they'd been required to sit in sections alongside home fans.

arts.ttl: “Not at the level” – Agbonlahor attacks 120k-a-week Villa player
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa star, Gabby Agbonlahor, has laid into one player at his former club, suggesting that he’s not good enough for what Villa need. The Midlands-based outfit are already plotting a January move for a 24-year-old playmaker, evidencing that Unai Emery still believes his squad needs strengthening. arts.ttl: “Staying up with Aston Villa” – Star picks out unusual career highlight, left a mark on him
arts.sum: Pepe Reina had a loan stint at Aston Villa in the second half of the 2019/20 season. The experienced goalkeeper played 12 times in the Premier League for the Villans and had a part in their survival in the top-flight. arts.ttl: 2 sources provide details of Aston Villa player’s injury setback – Emery’s side ‘won’t rush him’ back
arts.sum: At the weekend, Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martínez picked up an injury in his side’s 3-0 defeat to Chelsea at Stamford Bridge. The incident took place in the 29th minute when the Argentine international misplaced a pass to Chelsea star Nicolas Jackson inside Aston Villa’s box.
